emotional_tone: Premium, masculine, modern, precise, cinematic. A digital high-end barbershop.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Dashboard Control Room layout with generous internal padding. Mobile is stacked, Desktop is multi-pane.

structure_desktop.sidebar: col-span-2 or w-20 fixed vertical nav
structure_desktop.settings_panel: col-span-3 flex flex-col gap-4 border-l border-zinc-800 p-6

cards.style: bg-zinc-900/50 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/5 rounded-2xl overflow-hidden

upload_zone.style: border-2 border-dashed border-zinc-700 bg-zinc-900/30 rounded-3xl p-12 flex flex-col items-center justify-center text-center cursor-pointer

style_selector_item.style: relative aspect-square rounded-xl overflow-hidden border-2 border-transparent cursor-pointer group

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-black font-bold rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-primary-hover hover:scale-105 transition-all shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(228,168,83,0.2)]
buttons.secondary: bg-zinc-800 text-white font-medium rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-zinc-700 border border-zinc-700 transition-all

before_after_slider.handle: w-8 h-8 bg-white rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg border border-zinc-200 text-black

visual_enhancers.glassmorphism: Used for sticky bottom bars (mobile) or floating action panels. Use backdrop-blur-2xl bg-zinc-950/60 border-t border-white/5.
visual_enhancers.glow_effects: Subtle radial glows behind the main active photo viewer using the accent color.
visual_enhancers.textures: Add a very faint noise SVG overlay to the background to break the digital flatness.

media.instructions: Use these strictly in the UI. Missing assets will break the immersion. Do NOT use placeholder text. Map each category to the appropriate section.

hero_landing_background.description: Background for the welcome or auth screen. Large cinematic barbershop/haircut shot.

ai_transformation_demo.description: Main showcase image in the landing or 'How it works' section showing before/after.

icons.usage: Use stroke-width 1.5. Sizes typically w-5 h-5 for buttons, w-8 h-8 for empty states. Use scissors, camera, image, history, share-2, download.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure white text on dark gray surfaces meets 4.5:1 ratio. Provide focus rings for all interactive elements (ring-2 ring-primary).

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Setup the basic layout: A dashboard approach with a main viewer area and a scrollable side panel for selecting the 20+ styles.
2. Implement a 'React Compare Slider' component (or build a custom one) in the main viewer for the side-by-side Before/After comparison.
3. Use the provided Unsplash images to populate the 'Haircuts' and 'Beards' gallery options.
4. For the upload area, use a large, welcoming drag-and-drop zone that replaces itself with the main workspace once an image is uploaded.
5. Use 'Outfit' for all Headings and 'Manrope' for body text. Install these via Google Fonts.
6. Build a 'History' section or timeline that shows previous attempts (thumbnails).
7. Strictly apply the `data-testid` attributes to interactive elements to ensure the app passes testing.
8. Ensure there is a prominent 'Share' and 'Save' button overlaying or underneath the active result image.
